description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and a before_script that quietly updates apt, installs wget, tar, unzip, lib32stdc++6 and lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK zip from Google, extracts it, runs sdkmanager to install platform-tools and build-tools 26.0.1, sets ANDROID_HOME to the extracted SDK directory, adds its platform-tools to PATH, and makes ./gradlew executable. Define two stages, build and test, and set variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=26.0.1 and ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=26. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, saves the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the develop and master branches. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test and also runs only on develop and master.
